name: R Seurat marker-summary adapter v2
description: Aggregate an explicitly selected Seurat expression layer by a declared metadata group into the v2 marker-dotplot contract.

parameters.name: object
parameters.description: Trusted caller-supplied Seurat object, bound by the input artifact and never modified.

parameters.name: features
parameters.description: Features to summarize in caller-declared order.

parameters.name: layer
parameters.description: Existing expression layer; no normalization is performed.

parameters.name: average_transform
parameters.description: Use expm1 for log1p-normalized data or identity for linear values.

parameters.name: scale_average
parameters.description: Z-scale group averages within each feature while retaining the unscaled average.

parameters.name: scale_clip
parameters.description: Symmetric clip applied only when scale_average is true.

transformations.method: explicit expm1 or identity with optional declared per-feature z-scaling
fraction of cells with selected-layer value above zero within displayed group

supports_claims: Produces transparent group-level descriptive summaries for downstream plotting.
does_not_support: Does not establish marker specificity, differential significance, biological replication, batch robustness, pathway activation, mechanism, or causality.
required_statistics: declare assay, layer, transform, scaling, group, and detection denominator

visual_fingerprint.review_note: Non-rendering adapter; review applies to the downstream Recipe.

source.transformation: v2 parameter-contract revision of the original adapter

notes: Executed on the hash-bound 2,638-cell PBMC3K object as the upstream component of marker-dotplot-r-v2 with an explicit RNA data layer, expm1 transform, teaching_label grouping and within-group denominator.
The adapter is non-rendering; terminal native review and full chain evidence are bound in the downstream validation-evidence.json.
